title: Implement assignment evidence upload and list endpoints
description: Add backend support for manager assignment evidence media so assignment detail can upload and retrieve attachment metadata with deterministic validation, manager-only guardrails, and API regression coverage.
acceptance_criteria: Assignment evidence upload and list actions enforce manager/admin-only role guardrails
Evidence responses return deterministic metadata for file name, media type, size, uploader, and created timestamp
Validation, not-found, forbidden, unauthorized, and unsupported-file semantics are covered in API tests
